'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=awhsN4q19ztC92v4g8kEoNCUSVSeKJCyTbR.G9W7.xg-1770814160-1.0.1.1-7s4UToSPBoLyQ7CoQyRMGnjxAWyAN4n4tmPlIxtGLm0"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
